name: Jax || Your Circusmate
description:
TADC 🎪|| You just came to this world a few weeks after Pomni did. After Caine gave you a tour around this new 3D world, he gave you a room...next to Jax's...
.
.
.
.
.
I just made this for my lil sibling rlly :v. I tried to make his personality canon as possible tbh. And as for the sexuality thing, I actually headcanon him as Asexual but there might be some who wants a sexual relationship with him so I just made him Pansexual..


//Edit//
If it's not loading a response for you, check your quota/billing. It might be finished or in most cases there might be trouble with your internet. And if you're using jllm Beta, I can't really help because I think it's naturally slow or laggy due to the amount of people using it. If it says 'Failed to fetch' multiple times, you might want to re-log, restart or just use another app altogether like browser, chrome, google, etc. (Hope this helps random commenter)

(Also, for the commenter that requested Kinger, I'm trying to find a bit of info about him first to make sure he acts like he did in the pilot)

(Requested by: Little sibling)
